basics.name: Christian Alexander Olivares Amador
basics.label: Software Engineer, Business Analyst, Product - OPS
basics.summary:
Professional with 10+ years of experience in the banking and payments industry, specializing in project management, operations, and development.
Proven track record leading and delivering end-to-end initiatives, from requirements definition through implementation and monitoring, ensuring alignment with business objectives.
Strong focus on Project Management Office (PMO) practices, managing both BAU and strategic projects across global environments (North America, Europe, and Asia Pacific).
Experienced in stakeholder coordination, delivery tracking, risk management, and process optimization.
Skilled in data-driven decision making, continuous improvement, and execution under agile methodologies.

work.name: Global Payments
work.position: Business Analyst/ Support and Research Specialist
work.summary: Led and supported BAU backend projects, including repricing initiatives, product enhancements, and configuration of currency acceptance and card brands (Visa/Mastercard), while coordinating initiatives across global regions (US, UK, APAC) to ensure delivery within scope, timeline, and quality standards. Conducted in-depth analysis of merchant-reported issues, such as report discrepancies and settlement amounts, identifying root causes and proposing effective solutions. Collaborated with cross-functional teams across product, technology, and operations to drive efficient execution, while monitoring operational metrics to support data-driven decision-making and continuous improvement.

work.name: Global Payments Technology
work.summary: Managed end-to-end post-sales implementation projects for high-value clients, including physical terminals and digital payment solutions, coordinating internal and external stakeholders to ensure successful delivery within scope, timeline, and quality standards. Tracked product performance through KPIs and monthly reporting to inform project outcomes, identified improvement opportunities, and gathered requirements in collaboration with product teams, while providing specialized technical support to ensure operational continuity and high levels of customer satisfaction.

work.name: Oyster
work.summary: As a Product Operations Analyst, I supported product-related initiatives by working closely with Product Owners to plan and prioritize the backlog, conducting pre-release testing, and ensuring thorough documentation. I collaborated with cross-functional stakeholders—including marketing, design, customer service, and development teams—to drive alignment and successful delivery under agile methodologies such as Scrum and Kanban, while producing monthly product usage reports to enable data-driven decisions and continuous improvement.

work.name: Banco Sabadell
work.position: Supervisor Backoffice Cuentas - Banca en linea
work.summary: Supervised backoffice operations and coordinated operational teams while managing KYC and AML processes to ensure regulatory compliance. Contributed to process improvement initiatives and documentation in collaboration with Product Managers, supported audit readiness by preparing and managing client profiles for internal and external reviews, and optimized operational processes while supporting digital banking configurations to enhance efficiency and service delivery.

projects.name: Senoidal Blog
projects.description: Proyecto de divulgación de música, fotografia y arte
